worthSeeing.title: Bikini Atoll:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO nuclear test site, now an eerily beautiful diving destination.

worthSeeing.title: Laura Beach:
worthSeeing.text: White-sand beach at the end of Majuro Atoll, a local Sunday favourite.

worthSeeing.text: Dramatic shipwrecks and aircraft scattered across the lagoons.
